subject: Re: Never-ending loading in M
body:
Hi Piotr,

I have seen this with files on a networked filesystem, it went away when working locally - worth a try!

Cheers,

Alister

> On 10 Jun 2022, at 16:49, Piotr Tokarz <ptskold@gmail.com> wrote:
> 
> Hey all,
> 
> I have had an issue with this message for at least an hour since I started. Did anyone struggle with a similar situation? I assume problems with access to files? I have never worked with M before.
> 
> 
> Have a great weekend!
> Piotr
> 
>
